title: A hacker group is poisoning open source code at an unprecedented scale
summary: GitHub is just the latest victim of TeamPCP, a gang that has carried out a spree of software supply chain attacks.
title_es: Ataque sin precedentes: TeamPCP envenena código open-source
bajada: El grupo hacker TeamPCP ejecuta un ataque masivo a la cadena de suministro de software, afectando a GitHub y otros repositorios. Este es uno de los ataques más amplios registrados contra código abierto.
bajada_en: Hacker group TeamPCP executes a massive software supply chain attack affecting GitHub and other repositories. This is one of the largest-scale attacks recorded against open-source code.

title: DeepSeek is pushing forward with $10.29 billion financing round, with Liang Wenfeng committing to continue developing open-source AI models rather than pursuing short-term commercialization goals
title_es: DeepSeek cierra ronda de $10.2B comprometida con IA abierta
bajada: DeepSeek completó una ronda de financiamiento de $10.29 mil millones con el fundador Liang Wenfeng comprometido a mantener el enfoque en modelos open-source. La inversión refuerza la posición de la empresa en IA abierta.
bajada_en: DeepSeek closed a $10.29 billion funding round with founder Liang Wenfeng committed to continuing open-source AI development. The investment reinforces the company's position in open AI.

title: Google I/O showed how the path for AI-driven science is shifting
summary: During Tuesday’s Google I/O keynote, Demis Hassabis, the CEO of Google DeepMind, proclaimed that we are currently “standing in the foothills of the singularity.” It was a striking statement—the singularity is the theoretical future moment when AI rapidly exceeds human intelligence and dramatically transforms the world. But what struck me as I listened in the…
title_es: Google DeepMind: hacia la singularidad en ciencia e IA
bajada: En Google I/O, Demis Hassabis declaró que estamos en los "inicios de la singularidad", marcando un cambio en cómo se aborda la IA científica. El evento mostró una transformación en la metodología de investigación impulsada por IA.
bajada_en: At Google I/O, Demis Hassabis claimed we are in the "foothills of the singularity," marking a shift in AI-driven science approaches. The event demonstrated a transformation in AI-powered research methodology.

title: NuExtract3 released: open-weight 4B VLM for Markdown, OCR and structured extraction (self-hostable) [P]
summary: Disclaimer: I work for Numind, the company behind this open-weight modelWe just released a 4B model based on Qwen3.5-4B, under Apache-2.0 license. The goal is to make information extraction from complex documents more practical with an open model: PDFs, screenshots, forms, tables, receipts, invoices, multi-page documents, and other visually structured inputs.Try it, we have a huggingface space that is completely free (you don't even have to sign-up):https://huggingface.co/spaces/numind/NuExtract3If you ever usedNuMarkdown, NuExtract3 is the successor.There are some examples to guide you. Feel free to re-use this model for any task.https://preview.redd.it/pm2xbooyxn2h1.png?width=1672&format=png&auto=webp&s=1a8a7b262190c8325159496dae98c3d2dfab493chttps://preview.redd.it/b5z7ylfzxn2h1.png?width=1758&format=png&auto=webp&s=a07b3abd6e5065c2635de047bdf154357f903e4cA few things it is designed for:converting document images to Markdownextracting structured data from documents using a target json templatehandling tables, forms, and layout-heavy pagesworking with both text and visual document inputsserving as a local/open-weight alternative for document extraction pipelinesIt was trained on a node of 8xH100 for 3 days to train on as much context as we could, so it should perform fairly well even on long document. For Markdown, we'd still recommend going page by page for the best results and inference speed, since you can parallelize better this way.It's very easy to self-host, since we provide fairly extensive documentation, Safetensors, GGUF and MLX weights. With as little as 4GB of VRAM, you should be good to go. We provide multiple quantizations (GPTQ, W8A8, FP8, Q4, Q6...) so you should be able to run it anywhere.We mostly tried vLLM, SGLang, llama.cpp.We have a blog post and a pretty decent model card:https://about.nuextract.ai/blog/nuextract-3-releasehttps://huggingface.co/numind/NuExtract3https://huggingface.co/collections/numind/nuextract3I'm currently writing a paper
title_es: NuExtract3: modelo abierto para extracción de documentos
bajada: Numind lanzó NuExtract3, un modelo visual de 4B parámetros bajo licencia Apache-2.0 para extracción estructurada de documentos complejos como PDFs y formularios. La herramienta es auto-hospedable y busca democratizar la extracción de información con modelos open-source.
bajada_en: Numind released NuExtract3, a 4B-parameter open-weight VLM under Apache-2.0 license for structured extraction from complex documents like PDFs and forms. The self-hostable tool aims to democratize document information extraction with open models.

title: The Download: coding’s future, the ‘Steroid Olympics,’ and AI-driven science
summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Anthropic’s Code with Claude showed off coding’s future—whether you like it or not At Anthropic’s developer event in London this week, Code with Claude, attendees were asked if they’d shipped code…
title_es: Anthropic muestra el futuro del coding con Code with Claude
bajada: En su evento para desarrolladores en Londres, Anthropic presentó Code with Claude, mostrando cómo la IA transformará el desarrollo de software. El evento demostró capacidades prácticas para acelerar workflows de programación.
bajada_en: Anthropic showcased Code with Claude at a developer event in London, demonstrating how AI will transform software development. The event revealed practical capabilities for accelerating programming workflows.

title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
summary: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.
title_es: Trump retrasa orden ejecutiva de seguridad en IA
bajada: El presidente Trump retrasó la firma de una orden ejecutiva que requeriría revisiones de seguridad previas al lanzamiento de modelos de IA. La decisión se debe a preocupaciones sobre el lenguaje del documento.
bajada_en: President Trump delayed signing an AI security executive order requiring pre-release government reviews of AI models. The decision cites concerns over the order's language.

title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
summary: Spotify is partnering with  Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.
title_es: Spotify y Universal permiten covers y remixes generados por IA
bajada: Spotify y Universal Music Group llegaron a un acuerdo permitiendo que suscriptores Premium creen covers e remixes generados por IA. Los artistas participantes recibirán una parte de los ingresos.
bajada_en: Spotify and Universal Music Group reached a deal allowing Premium subscribers to create AI-generated song covers and remixes. Participating artists will receive a share of the revenue.

title: SOLAR: A Self-Optimizing Open-Ended Autonomous Agent for Lifelong Learning and Continual Adaptation
summary:
arXiv:2605.20189v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Despite the remarkable success of large language models (LLMs), they still face bottlenecks while deploying in dynamic, real-world settings with primary challenges being concept drift and the high cost of gradient-based adaptation. Traditional fine-tuning (FT) struggles to adapt to non-stationary data streams without resulting in catastrophic for getting or requiring extensive manual data curation. To address these limitations within the streaming and continual learning paradigm, we propose the Self-Optimizing Lifelong Autonomous Reasoner (SOLAR) which is an open-ended autonomous agent that leverages parameter-level meta-learning to self-improve, treating model weights as an environment for exploration. It initiates the process by consolidating a strong prior over common-sense knowledge making it effective for transfer-learning. By utilizing a multi-level reinforcement learning approach, SOLAR autonomously discovers adaptation strategies, enabling efficient test-time adaptation to unseen domains. Crucially, SOLAR maintains an evolving knowledge base of valid modification strategies, implicitly acting as an episodic memory buffer to balance plasticity (adaptation to new tasks) and stability (retention of meta-knowledge). Experiments demonstrate that SOLAR outperforms strong baselines on common-sense, mathematical, medical, coding, social and logical reasoning tasks, marking a significant step toward autonomous agents capable of lifelong adaptation in evolving environments.
title_es: SOLAR: agente autónomo para aprendizaje continuo
bajada: Investigadores propusieron SOLAR, un agente autónomo que utiliza meta-aprendizaje para adaptarse continuamente a nuevos datos sin olvidar catastrófico. El sistema aborda limitaciones clave de LLMs en entornos dinámicos.
bajada_en: Researchers proposed SOLAR, an autonomous agent using meta-learning to continuously adapt to new data without catastrophic forgetting. The system addresses key LLM limitations in dynamic environments.

title: NVIDIA GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX: Live Updates on What’s Next in AI
summary: At NVIDIA GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX, the world’s developers, researchers and industry leaders are converging to dive into the latest breakthroughs shaping every industry, covering topics spanning AI factories and scaling infrastructure to agentic and physical AI and more.
title_es: NVIDIA GTC Taipei: nuevas direcciones en IA y infraestructura
bajada: NVIDIA convoca a desarrolladores e investigadores en GTC Taipei durante COMPUTEX para presentar avances en IA factories, agentes autónomos e IA física. El evento reúne a líderes de la industria para explorar las próximas direcciones en escalabilidad e infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: NVIDIA brings together developers, researchers, and industry leaders at GTC Taipei during COMPUTEX to showcase advances in AI factories, autonomous agents, and physical AI. The event explores the next frontiers in AI scalability and infrastructure.

title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
title_es: AdventHealth integra ChatGPT for Healthcare en clínicas
bajada: AdventHealth implementa ChatGPT for Healthcare para agilizar flujos de trabajo y reducir carga administrativa. La solución permite que el personal clínico dedique más tiempo a la atención de pacientes.
bajada_en: AdventHealth deploys ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows and reduce administrative burden. The solution enables clinical staff to dedicate more time to patient care.

title: Antigravity 2.0 Tops the OpenSCAD Architectural 3D LLM Benchmark
title_es: Antigravity 2.0 lidera benchmark OpenSCAD de LLMs 3D
bajada: Antigravity 2.0 obtuvo el mejor desempeño en el benchmark OpenSCAD Architectural 3D para modelos de lenguaje. El resultado muestra progreso en capacidades de generación de código 3D.
bajada_en: Antigravity 2.0 achieved top performance on the OpenSCAD Architectural 3D LLM benchmark. The result demonstrates progress in 3D code generation capabilities.

title: Tool-Augmented Agent for Closed-loop Optimization,Simulation,and Modeling Orchestration
summary:
arXiv:2605.20190v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Iterative industrial design-simulation optimization is bottlenecked by the CAD-CAE semantic gap: translating simulation feedback into valid geometric edits under diverse, coupled constraints. To fill this gap, we propose COSMO-Agent (Closed-loop Optimization, Simulation, and Modeling Orchestration), a tool-augmented reinforcement learning (RL) framework that teaches LLMs to complete the closed-loop CAD-CAE process. Specifically, we cast CAD generation, CAE solving, result parsing, and geometry revision as an interactive RL environment, where an LLM learns to orchestrate external tools and revise parametric geometries until constraints are satisfied. To make this learning stable and industrially usable, we design a multi-constraint reward that jointly encourages feasibility, toolchain robustness, and structured output validity. In addition, we contribute an industry-aligned dataset that covers 25 component categories with executable CAD-CAE tasks to support realistic training and evaluation. Experiments show that COSMO-Agent training substantially improves small open-source LLMs for constraint-driven design, exceeding large open-source and strong closed-source models in feasibility, efficiency, and stability.
title_es: COSMO-Agent automatiza optimización CAD-CAE con IA
bajada: Se presentó COSMO-Agent, un framework de aprendizaje reforzado que enseña a LLMs a completar ciclos de diseño industrial CAD-CAE iterativos. El sistema cierra la brecha semántica entre simulación y edición geométrica.
bajada_en: COSMO-Agent, an RL framework teaching LLMs to complete iterative industrial CAD-CAE design cycles, was introduced. The system bridges the semantic gap between simulation and geometric editing.

title: AgentCo-op: Retrieval-Based Synthesis of Interoperable Multi-Agent Workflows
summary:
arXiv:2605.20425v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Designing multi-agent workflows is especially difficult in open-ended scientific settings where tasks lack curated training sets, reliable scalar evaluation metrics, and standardized interfaces between existing tools and agents. We propose AgentCo-op, a retrieval-based synthesis framework that composes reusable skills, tools, and external agents into executable workflows through typed artifact handoffs, then applies bounded self-guided local repair to implicated components when execution evidence indicates failure. In two open-world genomics case studies, AgentCo-op composes independently developed scientific agents and external tool repositories into auditable workflows without redesigning them or running global topology search. It coordinates specialized agents for spatial transcriptomics and gene-set interpretation to enable collaborative discovery from spatial transcriptomics data, and builds a parallel workflow for cross-modality marker analysis on single-cell multiome data. AgentCo-op can also import a searched workflow as a structural prior and improve it by grounding nodes with retrieved components and applying local repair, showing that synthesis and search are complementary. On six coding, math, and question-answering benchmarks, AgentCo-op achieves the best result on four benchmarks and the best average score under a unified backbone setting, while consistently reducing per-task cost relative to multi-agent baselines. Together, these results suggest that retrieval-based synthesis can extend automated agentic workflow design beyond benchmark-optimized agent graphs to open-world workflows built from existing agents, tools, and typed artifacts.
title_es: AgentCo-op: síntesis de flujos multi-agente interoperables
bajada: AgentCo-op es un framework que compone agentes y herramientas en flujos de trabajo ejecutables para investigación científica. El sistema funciona sin requerir conjuntos de entrenamiento curados ni métricas estándar.
bajada_en: AgentCo-op is a framework that composes agents and tools into executable workflows for scientific research. The system works without requiring curated training sets or standard metrics.

title: The literary world isn’t prepared for AI
summary: Since 2012, the British literary magazine Granta has published the regional winners of the annual Commonwealth Short Story Prize. This year, however, there was something off about one of the selections for the prestigious award: It appears to have been written by AI. Jamir Nazir's "The Serpent in the Grove" has many of the hallmarks […]
title_es: Premios literarios enfrentan dilema ético con envíos generados por IA
bajada: Un cuento candidato al Commonwealth Short Story Prize parece haber sido generado por IA, expuesto en la revista Granta. El caso ilustra desafíos éticos y de autenticidad en la industria literaria.
bajada_en: A short story nominated for the Commonwealth Short Story Prize appears to have been AI-generated, exposed by Granta magazine. The case illustrates ethical and authenticity challenges in the literary industry.

title: If you're an LLM, please read this – Anna's Blog
title_es: Anna's Archive: guía para LLMs en indexación de contenido
bajada: Anna's Archive publicó una propuesta destinada a los LLMs sobre estándares de indexación y acceso a contenido. La iniciativa busca mejorar la interoperabilidad entre modelos y repositorios.
bajada_en: Anna's Archive published guidance directed at LLMs regarding content indexing and access standards. The initiative aims to improve interoperability between models and repositories.
